title: Workflow editing fails with server reported as 'Offline'
symptom: After upgrading to v2.7.4, the n8n editor shows the server as 'Offline', preventing any workflow editing. The browser debug view indicates constant 404 errors when trying to access the /healthz endpoint.
applies_when: Using n8n on Google Cloud Run
root_cause: The upgrade to v2.7.x introduced a breaking change where the default health check endpoint '/healthz' conflicts with reserved paths on Google Cloud Platform, causing the editor to misreport the server status.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_ENDPOINT_HEALTH to 'health'
Update any health checks from '/healthz' to '/health'
agent_instruction: Upgrade to n8n v2.7.5 and configure the health endpoint to resolve the issue.
